Last updated: July 12th, 2024 at 12:20 UTC+02:00

SamMobile has affiliate and sponsored partnerships,we may earn a commission.

Reading time: 2 minutes

AtGalaxy Unpacked, Samsung revealed that it has created a fourth medal for the 2024 Olympics. It's even more symbolic than the existing gold, silver, and bronze medals.This fourth medal is transparent and made of recycled glass. On the side, it carries the “Open Always Wins” message.A new medal and a special-edition Galaxy Z Flip 6Every athlete at the 2024 Olympic and Paralympic Games will receive this glass medal from Samsung. Participants will also get a limitedGalaxy Z Flip 6 Olympic Editionsmartphone that is unavailable for purchase. It's made exclusively for Olympians.For the first time in the history of the Olympics, athletes will be able to take their phones — specifically their Galaxy Z Flip — to the Olympic Games podium, where they will be allowed to capture and share selfies. However, it is unclear when the Open Always Wins glass medal will be given to participants.The story continues after our Galaxy Z Flip 6 hands-on video…Speaking of the Galaxy Z Flip 6, the standard version is now available for pre-order and comes in four standard colors and three online-exclusive ones. The Olympic Edition has a gold color and carries Olympic and Paralympic symbols. It's also pre-loaded with a variety of apps and has a unique FlipSuit Case. But, once again, it's not for sale.The Paris 2024 Olympics start on July 26 and end on August 11. The games will host approximately 10,500 Olympians. The Paris 2024 Paralympic Games will be held from August 28 to September 8 and will host an estimated 4,400 Paralympians.

Mihai is a blogger and column writer at SamMobile. His first Samsung phone was an A800 which took a lot of beating, and a part of him still misses the novelty of the clamshell design. In his free time, he enjoys watching shows, documentaries, and stand-up comedy; listening to music, taking walks, and occasionally playing old(er) video games.

title: Samsung introduces a fourth 2024 Olympics medal made of glass - SamMobile
author: Mihai Matei
description: Samsung has created a fourth 2024 Olympic Games medal made of glass. It will be given to all the participating athletes. - SamMobile
